prevalence.trend: increasing with obesity and prolonged standing work

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical diagnosis; imaging for atypical/refractory cases

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Variable; physio and footwear access affect outcomes

regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Stretching, footwear changes, NSAIDs; physiotherapy; injections selectively
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Limited access to physiotherapy and orthotics and delayed care
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Low-cost stretching and activity modification can be effective
